title: Blood N' Particles Datapack
description: This datapack consists of adding blood and particles every time you receive and dealt damage; a touch of immersion to the game!
body:
![What is this mod?](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76a49f5fea336835463107550948f29444aba36a.png) This is a DATAPACK that consists of adding blood, particles and sounds every time you take and dealt damage to your enemies; adding a touch of immersion to the game!

All Overworld, Nether and End Mobs can bleed!

*If you have any suggestions for the DATAPACK or want to report a bug, don't forget to leave it in the comments* ![Support](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3438885f7a6c933e17c5e634a7aefdc4f48da308.png) If you like to support us, you can Join our  Discord or Support us monetarily on our  Patreon
